title: Five tech giants are hiding $1.65tn in AI debt, using the trick that toppled Enron
summary: Meta and Blue Owl Capital both put equity into a separate structure that took on $27 billion in debt. Meta’s off-balance-sheet debt alone is about $420 billion, nearly triple its reported debt.
caption: output/2026-07-21/five-tech-giants-are-hiding-1-65tn-in-ai-debt-using-the-trick-that-top.txt
